title: Validate Catch Error Pattern Executor
description: Validates that catch blocks follow the standardized pattern: catch (err: unknown) { const error = toError(err); }

mode.description: OFF: skip validation. MODIFIED_CODE: only catch blocks on changed lines in diff. MODIFIED_FILES: all catch blocks in modified files.

disableAllowed.description: Whether disable comments work. When false, no escape hatch.

ignoreModifiedUntilEpoch.description: Epoch seconds. Until this time, skip validation entirely. When expired, normal mode resumes. Omit when not needed.
